sentences.arabic: يَشْهَدُ الْعَالَمُ الْيَوْمَ تَوَجُّهًا مَلْمُوسًا نَحْوَ اِعْتِمَادِ النِّمْطِ الْغِذَائِيِّ الْمُتَوَازِنِ الَّذِي يَعْتَمِدُ عَلَى الْمَكَوِّنَاتِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ وَالطَّازَجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svijet danas svjedoči opipljivom trendu ka usvajanju uravnoteženog načina ishrane koji se oslanja na prirodne i svježe sastojke.
sentences.translationEn: The world today is witnessing a tangible trend toward adopting a balanced dietary pattern that relies on natural and fresh ingredients.

sentences.arabic: وَيُعَدُّ النِّظَامُ الْغِذَائِيُّ الْمُنْتَشِرُ فِي حَوْضِ الْمُتَوَسِّطِ نَمُوذَجًا مِثَالِيًّا، لِأَنَّهُ يَرْتَكِزُ عَلَى الْخَضْرَاوَاتِ وَالْفَوَاكِهِ وَالْبُرُوتِينَاتِ النَّبَاتِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ishrana rasprostranjena u mediteranskom bazenu smatra se idealnim modelom jer se bazira na povrću, voću i biljnim proteinima.
sentences.translationEn: The diet prevalent in the Mediterranean basin is considered an ideal model because it is based on vegetables, fruits, and plant proteins.

sentences.arabic: لَوْ اِلْتَزَمَ الْأَفْرَادُ بِتَقْلِيلِ السُّكَّرِيَّاتِ وَالْمَوَادِّ الْحَافِظَةِ، لَارْتَفَعَ مُسْتَوَى الصِّحَّةِ الْعَامَّةِ وَاِنْخَفَضَتْ نِسْبَةُ الْأَمْرَاضِ الْمُزْمِنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kada bi se pojedinci obavezali na smanjenje šećera i konzervansa, nivo općeg zdravlja bi porastao, a stopa hroničnih bolesti bi se smanjila.
sentences.translationEn: If individuals committed to reducing sugars and preservatives, the level of public health would rise and the rate of chronic diseases would decrease.

sentences.arabic: وَمِمَّا لَا شَكَّ فِيهِ أَنَّ الطَّبْخَ فِي الْمَنْزِلِ يُتِيحُ لِلْإِنْسَانِ الرَّقَابَةَ الْكَامِلَةَ عَلَى جَوْدَةِ الزُّيُوتِ وَكَمِيَّةِ الْأَمْلَاحِ الْمُضَافَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nema sumnje da kuhanje kod kuće omogućava čovjeku potpunu kontrolu nad kvalitetom ulja i količinom dodanih soli.
sentences.translationEn: There is no doubt that cooking at home allows a person full control over the quality of oils and the amount of added salts.

sentences.arabic: بِالْإِضَافَةِ إِلَى ذَلِكَ، يُنْصَحُ بِتَنَاوُلِ الْوَجَبَاتِ فِي أَوْقَاتٍ مُنْتَظِمَةٍ لِتَحْفِيزِ عَمَلِيَّاتِ الْأَيْضِ وَالْحِفَاظِ عَلَى الطَّاقَةِ طَوَالَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Osim toga, preporučuje se konzumiranje obroka u redovnim terminima kako bi se stimulisali procesi metabolizma i održala energija tokom cijelog dana.
sentences.translationEn: In addition, it is recommended to eat meals at regular times to stimulate metabolic processes and maintain energy throughout the day.

sentences.arabic: خِتَامًا، تَبْقَى الثَّقَافَةُ الْغِذَائِيَّةُ الْوَاعِيَةُ هِيَ الدِّرْعُ الْوَاقِي لِلْجِسْمِ فِي ظِلِّ انْتِشَارِ الْأَطْعِمَةِ السَّرِيعَةِ وَالْمُصَنَّعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zaključno, svjesna kultura ishrane ostaje zaštitni štit za tijelo u svjetlu širenja brze i prerađene hrane.
sentences.translationEn: In conclusion, a conscious nutritional culture remains the protective shield for the body in light of the spread of fast and processed foods.
